ANGEL HAS WRITTEN LETTERS TO ALL OF HER PEN PALS AND IS PUTTING ALL OF THE LETTERS IN ENVELOPES. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. IF ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS, HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES DID SHE USE?  

ANGEL HAS WRITTEN 80 LETTERS IN TOTAL. SHE PLACED 20 LETTERS INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THAT MEANS THE REMAINING LETTERS ARE 60. EACH LARGE ENVELOPE CONTAINS 2 LETTERS. TO FIND THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES, DIVIDE 60 BY 2. THE RESULT IS 30.  

ANGEL USED 30 LARGE ENVELOPES. THE SMALL ENVELOPES CONTAIN 20 LETTERS. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS IS 80. THE LARGE ENVELOPES ARE USED FOR MOST OF THE LETTERS. ANGEL PLACED THE LETTERS INTO ENVELOPES CAREFULLY. THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES IS 30.
